# Tolia by Innobiz

> Tolia is a premium B2B refillable diffuser system for fragrance, aromatherapy and wellness brands. It turns a one-time diffuser sale into recurring revenue through patented Twist & Mist refill technology.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview, business impact and free sample request for fragrance and wellness brands.
- [FAQ](/faq): Common questions about Tolia technology, stock orders, white-label production and samples.
- [Contact](/contact): Request a free Tolia sample or send a message to the Innobiz team.
- [Legal Notice](/legal): Company information, terms and legal disclosures.
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy): How Innobiz collects, uses and protects personal data.
- [Cookie Policy](/cookies): Information about cookies and tracking technologies on this site.
